reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the README Core Flow claim covered by schema-versioned eval packets, evaluate observation replay, and packet-backed readable renderer tests.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names packet shape, durable outputs, and readable views, which can be proven by deterministic CLI command execution and renderer tests.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by a checked-in self-dogfood eval fixture producing eval-cases.json, eval-observed.json, and eval-summary.json; evaluate observation reopening the observed packet into a second summary packet; a repo-local packet snapshot preserving the proof for later readers; and readable renderer tests proving packet/source-backed Markdown, browser, and HTML views preserve JSON packets as the audit source.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep README Core Flow reviewable-artifact wording aligned with eval packet outputs, evaluate observation replay, and the reviewable artifact projection matrix.
